heading: Physics Lab Practical Rescheduled
content: The Physics lab session originally scheduled for Monday has been moved to Thursday at 2:10 PM due to the public holiday.

heading: Placement Drive Announcement
content: A pre-placement talk by Infosys is scheduled for Wednesday at 10:00 AM in the Auditorium. All eligible students must attend in formal attire.

heading: Project Proposal Submission
content: Final-year students must submit their minor project proposals to the department coordinator by the end of this week.

heading: Mathematics Seminar
content: A seminar on "Applications of Linear Algebra in Machine Learning" will be held on Friday in Room 202. Attendance is mandatory for B-section students.

heading: Industrial Visit Registration
content: Registration for the upcoming industrial visit to ISRO is now open. Submit your consent forms to the class tutor by Tuesday.
